recommendations.name: predictive_adequacy
recommendations.inject: Re-run hardness + transfer; add hardness seed for live fail; repair owning operator (not densify Bitwork).

recommendations.name: coordination
recommendations.inject: Balance weak capability vs strong; fabric plan multi-engine; operator_program multi-hop end-to-end.

recommendations.name: manifold_adherence
recommendations.inject: SoftCascade geometry/planning pack-align; reduce geometry_blind; strengthen multipartite residual hops under open asks.

recommendations.name: resource_efficiency
recommendations.inject: Profile daemon warm path; avoid cold start; trim checklist fluency rewrite cost.

recommendations.name: claim_boundary
recommendations.inject: BRPC is candidate telemetry. Coherence is not consciousness. Never auto-promote .pwgt from C_BRPC.
